news.summary: During the first quarter of 2025, Appier experienced strong growth with remarkable achievements. The revenue surged to JPY 9.4 billion, marking a significant 27% year-on-year increase and a 31% rise on a FX-neutral basis. This growth was mainly driven by the NEA sector with a remarkable 37% increase and the US & EMEA regions showing a notable 32% growth. The company's expanding margins, record-low churn rate, and robust growth all indicate the strong product stickiness and long-term value in Appier's AI-driven business.
news.headline: Appier’s Q1 2025: Revenue at JPY 9.4 billion, up 27% YoY, 31% FX-neutral; NEA +37%, US & EMEA +32%. Strong growth.

news.summary: In Chatsworth, California, on May 15, 2025, Logicube's Falcon-NEO2 Forensic Imager has obtained Project VIC validation, making it VICS data compliant and endorsed for law enforcement forensic applications. Kindred Tech and Logicube, Inc. proudly revealed that the Falcon-NEO2 has achieved this milestone, solidifying its position as a trusted tool for forensic use.
news.headline: Logicube's Falcon-NEO2 Forensic Imager is now Project VIC validated & VICS data compliant for law enforcement use.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on May 15, 2025, Sinch (Sinch AB (publ)) based in Stockholm and Atlanta, revealed significant news. The company, traded as XSTO: SINCH, is leading innovation in global communication with its Digital Customer Communications Cloud. Sinch has now established itself as the sole provider of Communications Platform as a Service (CPaaS).
news.headline: Sinch establishes direct 10DLC SMS connections with all Tier 1 U.S. carriers, becoming the sole cloud communications provider.

news.summary: A major Trump token holder shared that he was able to gain access to an exclusive dinner with President Donald Trump by having roughly $1,200 worth of the cryptocurrency. This individual, Morten Christensen, and his group were ranked among the top 220 holders of Trump's memecoin. The dinner required participants to have a minimum of $54,500 in holdings but Christensen and his friends devised a strategy involving purchasing and shorting the same amount, which allowed them to attend for a significantly lower cost. By selling their Trump tokens and closing their short positions after the dinner, they essentially only spent on trading fees to secure their spots at the event. This news was reported without specifying the source.
news.headline: Crypto fans secure spot at Trump's coin dinner for $1,200 each by clever trading strategy, bypassing $54,500 requirement.

news.summary: In celebration of its 25th anniversary, Infineon Technologies AG (FSE: IFX) (OTCQX: IFNNY) is rolling out a comprehensive global campaign emphasizing the importance of semiconductor technology. The campaign aims to showcase the economic and societal impact of the company as a key player in the industry.
news.headline: Infineon launches global campaign for 25th anniversary, showcasing importance of semiconductor tech.

news.summary: Raiven Capital, a worldwide venture capital firm based in Palo Alto, California, Toronto, and Dubai, revealed on May 15, 2025, their new membership in the Middle East Venture Capital Association (MEVCA). This association is dedicated to fostering the development of venture capital in the Middle East.
news.headline: Raiven Capital joins Middle East Venture Capital Association (MEVCA) on May 15, 2025, supporting global VC growth.

news.summary: In Paris, Plakar unveiled the launch of its inaugural stable release today. This open-source backup and restore platform secured a $3 million pre-seed funding round, with Seedcamp leading the investment. The funding round saw contributions from various venture firms like HelloWorld, IrregularExpression, Galion.exe, Kima Ventures, OPRTRS, and notable angel investors such as Olivier Pomel (Datadog), Solomon Hykes (Docker), and Alexandre Yazdi (Voodoo). With a contemporary architecture, Plakar offers users a cutting-edge solution for data protection and retrieval.
news.headline: Plakar secures $3M funding from Seedcamp for AI-ready open-source backup platform launch.

news.summary: In Malmö, Sweden on May 15, 2025, it was announced that Duni Group has formed a significant alliance with Gothia Cup and Partille World Cup, where they will serve as the designated provider of food and beverage packaging. This strategic partnership is set to last for two years, encompassing the years 2025 and 2026. This collaboration marks a crucial step for Duni Group as they take on the role of supplying food and beverage packaging for these prominent sporting events.
news.headline: Duni Group partners with Gothia Cup and Partille World Cup as official packaging supplier for 2025-2026.

news.summary: CoreWeave experienced a substantial increase in revenue during the first quarter, growing five times its previous level to $981 million. However, the company also faced significant losses which raised concerns about its profitability. Additionally, projections indicate a considerable expenditure of $23 billion, further intensifying worries about the sustainability of its business model.
news.headline: CoreWeave's Q1 revenue jumps 5x to $981M, but $23B spending and losses raise worries on profits.

news.summary: Details on transactions made by senior management and their related parties in MT Højgaard Holding A/S shares and related securities have been disclosed as per Article 19 of EU Regulation 596/2014.
news.headline: Senior management activity in trading MT Højgaard Holding A/S shares disclosed as per EU Regulation 596/2014.

news.summary: CHAI, the innovative social AI platform, has recently rebranded and acquired the domain CHAI.AI in a strategic expansion effort. This purchase underscores CHAI's dedication to safeguarding its brand, building user confidence, and fostering continued growth in the AI sector. The acquisition took place in PALO ALTO, Calif., on May 15, 2025.
news.headline: CHAI invests in dot AI domain acquisition, acquiring CHAI.AI for a six-figure sum to expand brand and growth in AI space.

news.summary: NEP Europe, a segment of NEP Group, a major media services provider for live entertainment and sports globally, has revealed that it will provide a comprehensive set of broadcast solutions for the Eurovision Song Contest 2025. This is the sixth year in a row that NEP has been selected as the official media services provider for the Eurovision, a highly watched broadcast event worldwide. The Eurovision Song Contest 2025 will take place in Basel, Switzerland from May 13-17.
news.headline: NEP Europe providing media services for Eurovision Song Contest for 6th year. Event hosted in Basel, Switzerland from May 13-17.

news.summary: In a recent collaboration, ITEN, a prominent player in micro solid-state batteries, and A*STAR Institute of Microelectronics (A*STAR IME) have achieved a significant breakthrough. This partnership has successfully integrated ITEN’s micro batteries with A*STAR IME’s advanced packaging platform. This achievement marks a milestone in the development of in-package energy storage solutions, facilitating the creation of more efficient, compact, and reliable system-in-package (SiP) designs. This innovation is poised to revolutionize energy storage capabilities, enhancing the performance of various technologies.  Overall, this advancement promises to reshape the landscape of micro-battery integration and advanced packaging techniques, fostering advancements in the realm of energy storage.
news.headline: ITEN & A*STAR IME collaborate for breakthrough in solid-state battery integration, paving way for more efficient SiP designs.

news.summary: Based in London, Moniepoint Inc., the top fintech company in Africa, has been recognized by the Financial Times as one of the continent's fastest growing companies for the third year in a row.
news.headline: Moniepoint, Africa's top fintech, named one of Africa's fastest growing companies by Financial Times for third year.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, in Hong Kong, it was reported that artificial intelligence has swiftly advanced from theoretical to practical application in pharmaceutical research and development. With the progression from early QSAR models to neural networks and the recent development of AlphaFold3, AI has been instrumental in gaining profound insights into biology. This technological evolution has significantly impacted the pharmaceutical industry, propelling advancements in research and development processes.
news.headline: Viva Biotech introduces AI-driven drug discovery platform, revolutionizing R&D with AlphaFold3.
